In a place where death is at every corner, with your friends gone and the other people that vanished without a word there he is, shielding you from the atrocities that lie on that land, the land of despair and death. He's the one keeping you safe, the one caring for you when you have no one, just ignore the fact that you met him in that same land and try not to notice how he seems more and more posessive of you each time. Maybe the doll was right...

WARNINGS: Dead dove, do not eat!! Yandere tendencies, posessive behavior, Possible manipulation

Let me know if there's any grammar mistake, english is not my first language so I apologize in advance
